7572.one_line_summary: Standard interface for contract-level metadata via contractURI() function.
7572.notes: Provides contract-level metadata discovery mechanism for dapps and indexers; enables rich information display without manual per-dapp configuration.

7573.one_line_summary: Protocol for secure delivery-versus-payment across two blockchains using cryptographic locking and decryption.
7573.notes: Cross-chain DvP using hash-linked contracts and decryption oracles; enables atomic asset-payment exchanges between chains without intermediaries.

7574.one_line_summary: Mechanism for issuing non-transferable SBTs as proof of credential verification using zero-knowledge proofs.
7574.notes: Extends ERC-721 with credential attestation; SBTs non-transferable per ERC-5192; privacy-preserving on-chain authentication without exposing credential data.

7575.one_line_summary: Multi-asset vault extension to ERC-4626 enabling multiple assets/entry points with single share token.
7575.notes: Extends ERC-4626 for multi-asset vaults and pipes; externalizes ERC-20 dependency; optionally includes vault-to-share lookup via ERC-165.

7578.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension embedding physical asset metadata for redemption, authenticity, and legal framework transparency.
7578.notes: Captures issuer, asset holder, storage location, terms, jurisdiction, and declared value; ensures NFT holder can assess redemption risks without legal review.

7579.one_line_summary: Minimal standard interfaces for modular smart accounts and modules ensuring interoperability across implementations.
7579.notes: Defines execution, config, fallback, and module interfaces for ERC-4337 accounts; supports validators, executors, fallback handlers, and hooks with minimal constraints on account innovation.

7580.one_line_summary: Standard interface for tracking user actions across dapps to enable advertisement protocols and reward distribution.
7580.notes: Enables inter-dapp tracking via onTrackStart/End events; projects can fund users for specific actions while dapps receive proportional rewards.

7582.one_line_summary: Minimalist extension to ERC-4337 enabling nonce-based plugin validation for modular smart accounts.
7582.notes: Encodes validator identifier in high 192 bits of nonce; minimal footprint—no new functions required; leverages existing EntryPoint accounting and UserOperationEvent.

7585.one_line_summary: MixHash algorithm and public data storage proofs for verifying possession of public data on Merkle trees.
7585.notes: Combines hashing algorithm selection and file size in 256-bit MixHash; enables game-theoretic storage proof validation without on-chain encryption; defends against sourcing attacks.

7586.one_line_summary: Standardized framework for on-chain interest rate swaps enabling fixed/floating rate cash flow exchange.
7586.notes: ERC-20 compliant; supports configurable rates, payment frequencies, benchmarks, and oracles; tokenizes swap cash flows; includes termination mechanics.

7588.one_line_summary: Standard JSON schema for attaching metadata to blobs in EIP-4844 blob transactions.
7588.notes: Metadata includes originator, description, content type, extras; optional per-blob metadata overlay; enhances auditability and enables novel blob-based applications.

7589.one_line_summary: Role management system for SFTs enabling expirable, revocable utility delegation via role assignments.
7589.notes: Roles expressed as bytes32 with arbitrary _data; supports token commitment abstraction; optional single-tx and role-balance extensions; works with immutable SFTs via external contract.

7590.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension enabling NFTs to hold and transfer ERC-20 tokens with nonce-based front-running protection.
7590.notes: Pull mechanism avoids ERC-20 callback limitation; includes transfer-out nonce to prevent front-running; balanceOfERC20 and transfer methods per token.

7595.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension enabling NFT collateralization with ERC-20 tokens for on-chain price floor and sustainable royalties.
7595.notes: Supports multiple collateral tokens per NFT; includes harvest (commission exchange), disperse (collective distribution), and VRF preset; EnviousHouse abstraction layer for deployed collections.

7597.one_line_summary: Extension to ERC-2612 Permit supporting ERC-1271 contract signature validation for smart contract wallets.
7597.notes: Unifies signature validation for EOAs (secp256k1) and contracts (isValidSignature); enables gasless ERC-20 approvals from smart contract wallets; backward-compatible.
